mapper.sql: id, user_id, target_type, target_id, is_deleted, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_like WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_like (user_id, target_type, target_id, is_deleted, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{isDeleted}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM community_like WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId}
DELETE FROM community_like WHERE target_type = 1 AND target_id = #{topicId}
DELETE FROM community_like WHERE target_type = 2 AND target_id = #{commentId}
